data.body:
# HANDOFF — CURRENT STATE (START HERE for a new session)

This session DESIGNED (did NOT implement) LLM code review for rebar via a Gerrit gate. NO code was written. Authoritative source = the EPICS below; this session_log is the design narrative + rationale, and where it differs from the epics the EPICS WIN (earlier entries in this log were corrected by the "Gate correction" entry and by this one).

## Epics (all open; build order follows deps)
- E1 `d251-05e1-eb55-43b2` (P1, ready): Provision AWS Gerrit + rebar MCP; lock GitHub `main` to Gerrit. [infra prerequisite]
- E2 `9da1-cb98-2e94-4f2b` (P1, ready): Realign rebar reviews to the three-pass structure; migrate the CODE-REVIEW reviewers. Holds the 11-overlay catalog (one OVERLAY CATALOG comment per overlay) + the APPROVED base->overlay escalation decision comment.
- E3 `b744-4fb9-2d05-4b49` (P1, blocked by E1+E2): Agentic code-review capability — OFF BY DEFAULT, source-separated; dogfood on rebar.
- E4 `1fa8-9db4-7c1c-48f3` (P2, blocked by E1): Follow-on — add CI checks as a SECOND gate vote (`Verified`); require BOTH LLM-Review AND CI.
- Related existing epic 5fd2-a7c2-0aec-48fa (Plan-review verification gate): carries our comment to adopt the three-pass standard + make the gate catch the "Frankenstein" and "reinventing-the-wheel" antipatterns.

## Locked design (one-liners; full detail in this log's earlier entries + the epics)
- Gate: Gerrit is the ONLY writable path to `main`; GitHub is a read-only mirror. v1 gate = a SINGLE deterministic vote: the `LLM-Review` label, cast by the deterministic pass-3 blocker on thresholds (submit requirement `label:LLM-Review=MAX AND -has:unresolved`). `submitWholeTopic` lands whole features atomically. The two-vote end state (LLM + CI) is epic E4.
- Review = THREE passes for all rebar CODE reviews: (1) generate evidence records {finding, criteria[] in a LOCKED rubric, evidence[] flexible free-text, scenarios[], impact} — NO model severity/confidence; (2) a SEPARATE verifier agent re-grounds in the code and emits severity ATTRIBUTES {prod_impact, debt_impact, blast_radius, likelihood, reversibility} + typed BINARY verification sub-answers {yes|no|insufficient, evidence_span}; (3) a DETERMINISTIC aggregator: conditional veto (cited-reference-accuracy, only when a citation is present) + graded fraction -> confidence; severity from attributes; block|advisory on per-criteria thresholds (start HIGH -> mostly advisory). No model-emitted holistic severity/confidence in the decision path.
- Catalog: base (Google eng-practices) + 11 overlays (security, infra, testing, docs, performance, llm-prompts, api-compat, deps, db-migrations, a11y, i18n). Each sourced from PERMISSIVE tool taxonomies (see ROUND 1 / ROUND 2 entries in this log + the per-overlay OVERLAY CATALOG comments on E2). Author every rubric in our OWN words (taxonomies are facts). Scanner-as-ground-truth + LLM-as-judge where a permissive scanner exists.
- Escalation: overlay activation = deterministic triggers UNION base-reviewer escalation (bounded enum, one-hop, per-change cap). See the APPROVED escalation comment on E2.

## Explicitly OUT OF SCOPE / deferred
- completion_verifier is NOT migrated (unchanged) — out of scope for E2.
- Threshold CALIBRATION: deferred (start high -> advisory while data is gathered).
- CI second vote (`Verified`): deferred to E4.
- No human-in-the-loop / interactive escalation (the process is autonomous, fail-to-advisory).

## Critical-review status (context for the next session)
An Opus red-team review was run and its endorsed must-fixes were REJECTED by the owner; the design STANDS. Its flagged concerns (single-box hosting/HA + signing-key co-location, advisory-forever posture, pass-2 independence, copyCondition possibly certifying an unreviewed tree, dogfood under-testing most overlays) are on record but NOT actioned — revisit only if directed.

## Bugs filed this session (rebar DX defects, separate from the design)
- 94a3 (tracker .gitignore omits lock/cache files), b156 (no non-interactive bootstrap), ab61 (init-gate inconsistency: comment vs create), eb82 (link write exits 0 without persisting when piped).

## Environment note for the next session
rebar is NOT pip-installed in this container; run it via `PYTHONPATH=src` + `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR=$PWD/.tickets-tracker`, with a git worktree of `origin/tickets` at `.tickets-tracker` and a seeded `.env-id` (see bug b156). Each write may leave a stray `.ticket-write.lock` / `.graph-cache.json` in the tracker (bug 94a3) — clean before relying on git status.
